name: Thumbor
description: Thumbor — Open-source smart image cropping and resizing service with face detection and on-the-fly processing.

seo.title: Thumbor — CDN / Edge / Acceleration
seo.meta_description: Thumbor: Thumbor — Open-source smart image cropping and resizing service with face detection and on-the-fly processing.

when_to_use: Open-source smart image cropping with face detection
Self-hosted image processing proxy on-the-fly via URL
Replacing paid image CDN with self-hosted Thumbor instance
Smart crop around faces and subjects in auto-generated thumbnails
On-demand image resizing and format conversion for web apps

pros: Face and feature detection for smart cropping
cons: Python stack can be slower than Go alternatives
review.verdict: Venerable self-hosted image processor with smart cropping, imgproxy is often faster for pure resize workloads.
review.best_for: Teams needing self-hosted image processing with face detection and smart crops
review.not_for: High-throughput pipelines where imgproxy's Go performance wins
